data.name: Monster Girls Onsen
data.detailed_description:
Monster Girls Onsen is an 18+ anime visual novel with light management elements, set in a mystical Japanese hot spring you unexpectedly inherit.

By day, you run the onsen, serve guests, and expand its facilities.
By night, you encounter enchanting monster girls — the regal sun goddess Amako-sama, the shy ghost Senako, the icy beauty Yukino, and the playful fox Hina.

To claim your place as the rightful master of the onsen, you must earn their trust… and satisfy their desires.

As the story unfolds, expect emotional confessions, steamy encounters, and unforgettable nights that unveil the secrets of the spirits — and the hot spring itself.

🔥 Features:

  • 🧖‍♀️ Manage and upgrade your own traditional Japanese onsen

  • 💕 Build relationships with four unique monster girl spirits

  • 🔥 Enjoy fully illustrated NSFW scenes with multi-stage animations

  • 🎨 Gorgeous 2D anime-style art with a classical Japanese aesthetic

  • 🎭 A relaxing mix of cozy management and erotic storytelling

data.short_description: Seduce sexy monster girls and run your own Japanese hot spring in this adult anime visual novel. Upgrade your onsen, unlock NSFW scenes, and explore a steamy mythological story.
data.supported_languages: 俄文, 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
